understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver one or more selectable pieces onto the goal tiles (marked by '+') in the grid, or otherwise satisfy a level-specific WIN condition, within a finite number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed in discrete steps in four directions, attempting to shift the currently selected piece one cell at a time. Some objects were pushable blocks that could be pushed if adjacent, while certain walls blocked movement entirely. Multiple selectable pieces could be controlled by using CLICK with pixel/grid coordinates to switch selection. The movement and selection of pieces, along with interactions with blocks and walls, were key to solving each level's puzzle.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver one or more selectable pieces onto the goal tiles (marked by '+') in the grid, or otherwise satisfy a level-specific WIN condition, within a finite number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed in discrete steps in four directions, attempting to shift the currently selected piece one cell at a time. Some objects were pushable blocks that could be pushed if adjacent, while certain walls blocked movement entirely. Multiple selectable pieces could be controlled by using CLICK with pixel/grid coordinates to switch selection.
